seoTitle: West Gosford vs West Haven — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Gosford and West Haven. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Gosford vs West Haven: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Gosford and West Haven.
heading: West Gosford vs West Haven — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Gosford, New South Wales and West Haven, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Haven has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to West Gosford (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Gosford or West Haven safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Gosford has a flood risk score of 53/100, while West Haven scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Gosford scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. West Haven scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Gosford or West Haven?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Haven has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
